mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_reports (category, reporter_name, message, source_url, item_name, is_public, is_deleted) VALUES (#{category}, #{reporterName}, #{message}, #{sourceUrl}, #{itemName}, #{isPublic}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: SELECT id, category, reporter_name as reporterName, is_public as isPublic, is_deleted as isDeleted, message, source_url as sourceUrl, item_name as itemName, created_at as createdAt, admin_reply as adminReply, replied_at as repliedAt FROM wiki_reports WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, category, reporter_name as reporterName, is_public as isPublic, is_deleted as isDeleted, message, source_url as sourceUrl, item_name as itemName, created_at as createdAt, admin_reply as adminReply, replied_at as repliedAt FROM wiki_reports WHERE is_deleted = false AND is_public = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
